nasb.text: So Moses said to them, “If you will do this, if you will arm yourselves before the Lord for the war,

esv.text: So Moses said to them, “If you will do this, if you will take up arms to go before the Lord for the war,

cnv.text: 摩西對他們說：“如果你們這樣行，在耶和華面前武裝起來去作戰，

ccb.text: 摩西说：“如果你们信守承诺，拿起兵器在耶和华面前出战，
